message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update issues.jsonl with current state of tracked issues. This JSONL
export represents the git-friendly format for collaborative issue
tracking.

Changes include updated timestamps, status transitions, and issue
metadata reflecting recent development activity across the project.

The .beads/issues.jsonl file serves as the source of truth for git-based
synchronization while beads.db remains the primary SQLite storage for
local queries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
